program.name: Credit Memo Stateful
intake.purpose: Carry invoice credit request state through normalization, credit calculation, and credit memo posting.
intake.stages_json: [{"slug":"intake","is_bootstrap":true},{"slug":"normalize_credit","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text.invoice_id","inputs.initial_user_text.subtotal_cents","inputs.initial_user_text.defect_units","inputs.initial_user_text.unit_credit_cents","inputs.initial_user_text.requested_credit"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","invoice_id":"string","subtotal_cents":"number","defect_units":"number","unit_credit_cents":"number","requested_credit":"boolean"},"items_json":["invoice:<invoice_id>","defect_units:<defect_units>"]},"rules":["Parse input.domain[\"inputs.initial_user_text\"] as JSON.","Echo invoice_id, subtotal_cents, defect_units, unit_credit_cents, and requested_credit from the request without applying credit decisions."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal normalize_credit.","items_json must be exactly [\"invoice:<invoice_id>\", \"defect_units:<defect_units>\"]."]}},{"slug":"calculate_credit","domain_spec":{"reads":["normalize_credit.output.result_json.invoice_id","normalize_credit.output.result_json.subtotal_cents","normalize_credit.output.result_json.defect_units","normalize_credit.output.result_json.unit_credit_cents","normalize_credit.output.result_json.requested_credit"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","invoice_id":"string","eligible_units":"number","unit_credit_cents":"number","credit_cents":"number","reason_code":"string"},"items_json":["credit_cents:<credit_cents>","reason:<reason_code>"]},"rules":["Parse normalize_credit.output.result_json before calculating credit.","If requested_credit is false, eligible_units is 0, credit_cents is 0, and reason_code is no_request.","If requested_credit is true, eligible_units is defect_units and credit_cents is Math.min(subtotal_cents, defect_units * unit_credit_cents).","If requested_credit is true and credit_cents is greater than 0, reason_code is defect_credit_applied; otherwise reason_code is no_defects."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal calculate_credit.","invoice_id must be preserved from normalize_credit.","items_json must be exactly [\"credit_cents:<credit_cents>\", \"reason:<reason_code>\"]."]}},{"slug":"memo_posting","domain_spec":{"reads":["calculate_credit.output.result_json.invoice_id","calculate_credit.output.result_json.credit_cents","calculate_credit.output.result_json.reason_code"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","invoice_id":"string","posting_type":"string","amount_cents":"number","source_reason":"string"},"items_json":["posting:<posting_type>","amount_cents:<amount_cents>"]},"rules":["Parse calculate_credit.output.result_json before posting.","posting_type is credit_memo when credit_cents is greater than 0; otherwise posting_type is no_credit.","amount_cents must equal calculate_credit.output.result_json.credit_cents.","source_reason must equal calculate_credit.output.result_json.reason_code."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal memo_posting.","The memo amount must preserve credit_cents from calculate_credit without recomputing from the original request.","items_json must be exactly [\"posting:<posting_type>\", \"amount_cents:<amount_cents>\"]."]}},{"slug":"complete","is_terminal":true}]
